sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE, ip_address INET);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date, ip_address) VALUES (date '2020-03-22', inet '192.168.1.5');
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date, ip_address) VALUES (date '2021-01-01', inet '192.168.1.6');
SELECT sys.date_to_str((SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < date '2021-06-01' ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 1), '%D %d.%m.%Y') AS formatted_date;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%Y-%m-%d') < '2020-12-31' AND ip_address < inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT event_date, sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%d-%m-%Y') AS str_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT sys.date_to_str((SELECT MIN(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE ip_address < inet '192.168.1.10'), '%Y/%m/%d') AS min_date;

SELECT event_date, ip_address FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IN (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL AND ip_address < inet '192.168.1.10') GROUP BY event_date, ip_address HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT sys.date_to_str(date '2021-12-31', '%Y-%m-%d') AS year_end_date, ip_address FROM test_dates WHERE ip_address < inet '192.168.2.0';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT event_date, sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%A') AS day_name FROM test_dates WHERE ip_address IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT ip_address FROM test_dates WHERE sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%Y-%m-%d') LIKE '2020%';
SELECT ip_address, sys.date_to_str(event_date, '%Y/%m/%d') FROM test_dates WHERE ip_address IS NOT NULL AND event_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 2 DESC;
